_note: Standalone medical Group 2 example. 6000x5000mm operating room with single medical_patient_position anchor (Group 2). Triggers full medical_it_system constraint per BS 7671:2018 §710 + BS EN 61557-8 (IMD 8 s alarm response) + HTM 06-01 (NHS precedence). Also includes supplementary_equipotential_bonding constraint. INV-03 PASS. D-4 flag NOT raised because 5kVA transformer sits inside 3.15-8kVA plausibility band.

anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Operating table centroid extracted from architect Rev-E theatre layout dated 2026-05-22; central position with surgical luminaire pendant; bed top at 1000mm AFF per equipment schedule.
